chemo.name: Filgrastim (G-CSF)
notes: Continue until ANC ≥ 1000 for two consecutive days
Helps prime marrow for Fludarabine + Cytarabine

chemo.name: Idarubicin
notes: Use central line; avoid peripheral line
Give after Fludarabine and Cytarabine if ordered sequentially

chemo.name: Fludarabine
notes: Administer before Cytarabine to enhance Ara-C uptake

chemo.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
notes: Requires steroid eye drops for neuroprotection

nursingNotes: Indication: High-risk AML (adverse cytogenetics, secondary AML, TP53 mutation, high FLT3-ITD ratio, hyperleukocytosis)
High risk of myelosuppression — monitor CBC daily
Monitor for Cytarabine syndrome: fever, myalgia, rash
TLS risk: ensure hydration and uric acid control
Check for neurotoxicity daily during high-dose Ara-C
